text: Pixel Journey started on WAX in 2023 and is expanding across chains. Not just NFTs — a full ecosystem of verifiable mechanics, education, playful ownership, and long-term vision. The goal is simple: make Web3 feel like a retro pixel adventure worth exploring for years.
cta: Read the full vision in our GitBook →

text: WAX will always be home, but Pixel Journey is going multi-chain. Secure cross-chain key derivation in PxWallet means your identity and assets can travel safely. One journey, many chains.
cta: See the derivation flow in PxWallet →

text: We believe in trustless systems that are still fun. Verifiable seeds, on-chain voting, no hidden team wallets, community-first drops. Serious tech + meme culture. That’s the Pixel Journey way.

Real World Assets are coming to Pixel Journey. Not just digital collectibles — on-chain representation of real value, ownership, and community governance. The pixel universe is expanding into the real world.
cta: Stay tuned for the first RWA drop →
